Notes: Single UPDATE adds an A RRset at temp.campus.edu. and deletes the same owner/type rrset in the same message, with no prerequisites, to probe whether the server treats UPDATE RRs as ordered, atomic, or set-like.

Steps.Description: Add temp.campus.edu. A 192.0.2.10, then delete the temp.campus.edu. A rrset in the same UPDATE.

Steps.Name: temp.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A rrset remains present after the UPDATE.
